title: Ahtna Declares 2015 Shareholder and Elder Dividend
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – On November 21, 2015, in accordance with the Earnings Distribution Policy, the Ahtna, Inc. Board of Directors formally declared a shareholder dividend for 2015 of $4.43, or $443 per 100 shares, which is the same amount per share as last year and Ahtna’s second highest dividend pe...
